holdings.infoBox: VDI is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.64%, HSBC Holdings at 2.37%, Tokyo Electron at 2.28%, BHP Group at 2.16%, and Roche Holding AG at 2.05%.

overview.description: The Virtus International Dividend ETF (VDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in dividend-paying companies across developed and emerging markets outside the US. The fund seeks to provide equity income through global ex-US stocks selected for their dividend characteristics. VDI was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.
